entryPoints.description: Loading state gate — renders before any content
entryPoints.currentBehavior: Plain text: 'Loading TeamFrame workspace…' on white background
entryPoints.friction: CRITICAL — No branding, no progress, no value communication. First impression is a blank page with a status string.
entryPoints.fix: Replace with branded loading screen that communicates what is being prepared

entryPoints.description: Bootstrap function — silently creates org if none exists
entryPoints.currentBehavior: Silent API call, user receives no feedback during this phase
entryPoints.friction: MODERATE — User waits with no context. If API is slow, experience is opaque.
entryPoints.fix: Surface bootstrap progress in loading screen with contextual messages

entryPoints.currentBehavior: Single unstyled line: 'No positions yet. Create a root position to start.'
entryPoints.friction: CRITICAL — No CTA, no visual guidance, no explanation of value. User dead-ends immediately.
entryPoints.fix: Full-panel guided empty state with single primary CTA and value explanation

entryPoints.description: Side panel empty state — when no position is selected
entryPoints.currentBehavior: Text: 'Select a position from the org chart.'
entryPoints.friction: LOW — Acceptable as secondary, but should guide the action
entryPoints.fix: Replace with context-aware helper text that points to the primary CTA

firstValueMoment.definition: User sees their first position rendered as a node in the org chart with a team label and status badge
firstValueMoment.currentState: No visual confirmation. Position appears silently after form submit.
firstValueMoment.targetState: Position card animates in with a brief success banner: 'Your org chart is live.'
firstValueMoment.followOnAction: Banner with guided next step: 'Assign a person to this position →'

issues: No icons — navigation relies 100% on text label recall
Active state uses only background color change — low contrast
No logo mark or brand identity
Version label 'TeamFrame V1 · Execution' is developer-facing language

statusBar.currentContent: Positions X | Filled X | Open actions X | Needs attention X
issues: Reads as a debug/developer metrics bar
No semantic grouping or visual weight hierarchy
Error messages mixed directly into this bar
Mutation status ('Syncing changes…') uses same font size as error text

mainContent.title: 'Org Chart' h1 + subtitle 'Select a node to manage assignment…'
issues: Title is redundant with the nav item already selected
Subtitle is an instruction, not a value statement
Panel uses box with min-height 620px but no graceful empty state

frictionMap.issue: No brand identity or value communication during load
Dead-end empty state with no actionable CTA
Text-only navigation, no icons, no active state affordance
Status bar looks like debug output, not product value
No success confirmation after first action completed
Side panel empty state is a dead end
Zero use of installed Tailwind/shadcn/Lucide/Framer Motion — raw inline styles throughout

technicalDebtSummary.componentSize: 3043 lines in single file — high cognitive load for maintenance
technicalDebtSummary.stylingApproach: 100% inline style objects — Tailwind, shadcn, Lucide all installed but unused
technicalDebtSummary.stateManagement: 30+ useState hooks in root component — causes full re-render on every mutation

recommendedComponentsToCreate.purpose: Branded loading state with animated progress messages
Full-panel guided empty state with primary CTA
Premium sidebar with Lucide icons + status bar
First-value confirmation banner after first position created
